title: Final Papers & Calendar
description: Prepare the complete final submission package for court review before a judgment of divorce can be issued. Some forms are mandatory for every case; others apply only to your circumstances.
tips: Complete sworn statements and affirmations that apply to your case before filing the final package.
Include child support, maintenance, or religious-barrier forms only when they apply to your situation.
File the full final submission when your papers are complete so the court can review the case for judgment.
warnings: Incomplete final papers are a common reason for court rejection.
